languages.title: Lingwa
languages.subtitle: Agħżel il-lingwa użata matul l-app.
languages.noResults: L-ebda lingwa ma taqbel mal-ifittxija tiegħek.

phone.label: Numru tat-telefon
phone.searchCountry: Fittex pajjiż, kodiċi, jew prefiss ta' djaling
phone.noCountries: L-ebda pajjiż ma jaqbel mat-tfittxija tiegħek.
phone.tooShort: Dan in-numru tat-telefon huwa qasir wisq.
phone.tooLong: Dan in-numru tat-telefon huwa twil wisq.
phone.invalid: Daħħal numru tat-telefon validu għall-pajjiż magħżul.

auth.onboardingTagline: Sieħeb personali ta' sigurtà għall-mumenti bejn "Jien tajjeb" u "Għandi bżonn għajnuna."
auth.createSubtitle: Agħżel metodu ta' login biex tipproteġi l-grafiku tas-sigurtà tiegħek.
auth.signInFailedMessage: Ma stajniex nkomplu l-iloging. Iċċekkja l-konnessjoni tiegħek u erġa' ipprova.
auth.googleUnavailableMessage: Bl-użu ta' sessjoni ta' żvilupp lokali. Native Google Sign-In jaħdem f'bini ta' żvilupp.
auth.northStarSubtitle: Għaqqad issa jew kompli u żid aktar tard.
auth.northStarBody: Il-VL01 li jintlibes jista' jattiva flussi ta' sigurtà b'taps u ġesti ta' pressjoni twila.
auth.meetCapybearSubtitle: Il-kumpanija tas-sigurtà ġentili tiegħek fuq il-mappa u fil-telefonati.
auth.capybearBody: Capybear tista' tgħin bil-modalità dar, modalità guardian, modalità ta' emerġenza, sejħiet ta' skuża, u appoġġ bil-vuċi.

permissions.locationSubtitle: Użat għall-mappa, żoni ta' periklu, wasla sigura, u SOS kuntest.
permissions.locationBody: VeryLoving jistaqsi l-post sabiex il-gwardjani jifhmu fejn jista' jkun hemm bżonn ta' għajnuna. Tista' tbiddel dan aktar tard fis-Settings.
permissions.notificationsSubtitle: In-notifiki jappoġġjaw check-ins u avvenimenti ta' emerġenza.
permissions.notificationsBody: Aħna nużaw biss notifiki għal prompts ta' sigurtà, aġġornamenti ta' emerġenza, u twissijiet li tippermetti.
permissions.locationRationaleMessage: VeryLoving juża l-post tiegħek għall-mappa tas-sigurtà, żoni ta' periklu, quick share, u SOS kuntest. Tista' tbiddel dan aktar tard fis-Settings.
permissions.notificationsRationaleMessage: VeryLoving jibgħat twissijiet ta' check-in, aġġornamenti ta' emerġenza, u prompts ta' sigurtà li tippermetti. Aħna ma nużawx notifiki għal reklami.
permissions.microphoneRationaleMessage: VeryLoving juża l-mikrofonu tiegħek biss meta tibda sejħa AI companion jew safety.
permissions.bluetoothRationaleMessage: VeryLoving juża Bluetooth biex jingħaqad ma' ġojjellerija NorthStar, jaqra l-istatus tal-konnessjoni, u jħalli l-flussi ta' sigurtà mill-wearable.
permissions.cameraRationaleMessage: VeryLoving tuża l-kamera biss meta tagħżel li tieħu ritratt ta' profil jew taqsam immaġni ta' sigurtà.

tutorial.sharedBody: VeryLoving jżomm dan il-fluss disponibbli kemm mis-settings kif ukoll mid-dashboard.
tutorial.chooseVoiceSubtitle: Agħżel il-vuċi companion li tħossok l-iktar sigur biex tisma'.
tutorial.emergencySubtitle: Ħames taps jistgħu jkomplu għal twissijiet ta' SOS u gwardjani.
tutorial.excuseSubtitle: Oħloq raġuni sabiħa biex titlaq minn sitwazzjoni mhux komda.
tutorial.safetyCallSubtitle: Ibda sejħa ta' sieħeb f'ħin reali meta jkollok bżonn appoġġ.
tutorial.practiceSubtitle: Ippruvaw il-flussi tas-sigurtà f'demo ta' pressjoni baxxa.

jewelry.pairSubtitle: Żomm il-ġojjellerija qrib waqt li tiskannja.
jewelry.noDevices: Ma nstab l-ebda apparat ta' NorthStar viċin s'issa.
jewelry.scanStartFailed: Bluetooth-scanning ma setgħetx tibda. Jekk jogħġbok ipprova mill-ġdid.
jewelry.scanFailed: Ma stajniex insibu ġojjellerija fil-viċin. Iċċekkja Bluetooth, żomm NorthStar viċin, u erġa' ipprova.
jewelry.scanAccessFailed: Bluetooth-scanning ma setgħetx tibda. Iċċekkja Bluetooth-aċċess u erġa' ipprova.
jewelry.permissionDenied: L-aċċess għall-apparat viċin huwa mitfi. Ippermetti aċċess Bluetooth f'Settings, imbagħad ipprova mill-ġdid.
jewelry.connectTimeout: NorthStar ħadet wisq żmien biex tikkonnettja. Ħuha eqreb u erġa' ipprova.
jewelry.connectFailed: Ma stajniex ngħaqqdu ma' NorthStar. Iċċekkja li hija ċċarġjata u viċin, imbagħad ipprova mill-ġdid.
jewelry.emptyMessage: Żomm NorthStar ċarġ u viċin dan it-telefon, imbagħad skennja mill-ġdid.

home.subtitle: Dashboard tas-sigurtà
home.readyBody: Il-vuċi, il-mappa, il-ġojjellerija u l-gwardjani huma f'kuntatt wieħed 'il bogħod.

map.title: Mappa tas-sigurtà
map.previewSubtitle: Expo Go preview; Mapbox jirrendi f'build ta' żvilupp.
map.updateFailed: Ma stajniex naġġornaw il-post tiegħek. Jekk jogħġbok ipprova mill-ġdid.
map.notRequested: Ma ġiex mitlub aċċess għall-post. Tista' tippermettih aktar tard minn Settings.
map.permissionOff: L-aċċess għall-post huwa mħassar. Ippermettih fis-settings biex iċ-ċentru tal-mappa tas-sigurtà fuqek.
map.timeout: Il-post tiegħek qed jieħu aktar żmien milli mistenni. Imxi xi post b'sinjal aktar ċar u erġa' ipprova.
map.savedEmptyMessage: Postijiet affidabbli li ssejvaw jidhru hawn għal aċċess mgħaġġel.
map.geofenceEntered: You entered the %{radius}m saved-place safety zone.
map.geofenceExited: You left the %{radius}m saved-place safety zone.

safetyCall.emptyMessage: Ibda t-telefonata jew ikteb messaġġ meta tkun lest.

history.clearMessage: Dan ineħħi l-messaġġi AI ta' sempliċi minn dan l-apparat.
history.title: Storja tal-konversazzjonijiet
history.subtitle: AI messaġġi ta' semplu maħżuna fuq dan l-apparat.
history.emptyMessage: Il-AI konversazzjonijiet tiegħek se jidhru hawn wara l-ewwel sejħa tiegħek.
history.loadFailed: Ma stajniex nħaddmu l-istorja tal-konversazzjonijiet. Jekk jogħġbok ipprova mill-ġdid.
history.clearFailed: Ma stajniex nħassru l-istorja tal-konversazzjonijiet. Jekk jogħġbok ipprova mill-ġdid.
history.deleteFailed: Ma stajniex inħassru dik il-konversazzjoni. Jekk jogħġbok ipprova mill-ġdid.

voices.title: Il-vuċijiet tiegħi tas-sejħa tas-sigurtà
voices.subtitle: Agħżel il-vuċi tal-kumpanija li tħossok tajjeb biex tisma'.
voices.selectionFailedMessage: Jekk jogħġbok ipprova tagħżel il-vuċi mill-ġdid.
voices.sampleFailedMessage: Dan il-kampjun tal-vuċi ma setax jintlagħab. Jekk jogħġbok ipprova mill-ġdid.

settings.offlineModeSubtitle: Uża tweġibiet kumpanija magħquda meta l-kredenzjali tan-netwerk jew tal-Hume ma jkunux disponibbli.
settings.privacyBody: Esporta jew ħassar id-data lokali maħżuna fuq dan l-apparat.
settings.exportFailedMessage: Ma nistax jesporta d-dejta tiegħek bħalissa.
settings.deleteConfirmMessage: Dan ineħħi l-profil tiegħek, is-settings, il-kuntatti ta' emerġenza, l-istorja tal-konversazzjonijiet, twissijiet ta' permessi, u sessjoni ta' awtenzjoni lokali minn dan l-apparat.
settings.deleteFailedMessage: Ma nistax inħassar id-dejta lokali bħalissa.

sections.languageSubtitle: Interface u lingwa ta' permess tas-sistema
sections.deviceSafetySubtitle: NorthStar, gwardjani, u kuntatti ta' emerġenza

settings.updateFailedMessage: Ma stajniex insalvaw dik il-preferenza. Jekk jogħġbok ipprova mill-ġdid.
settings.signOutFailedMessage: Is-sessjoni tiegħek għadha attiva. Jekk jogħġbok ipprova mill-ġdid.

contacts.title: Kuntatti ta' emerġenza
contacts.subtitle: Persuni ta' fiduċja disponibbli waqt il-flussi ta' sigurtà.
contacts.name: Isem
contacts.empty: Għad m'hemmx kuntatt ta' emerġenza miżjuda.
contacts.emptyTitle: Għad m'hemm l-ebda kuntatt ta' emerġenza
contacts.emptyMessage: Żid xi ħadd li tafda biex ikunu lesti meta jkun hemm bżonn ta' sigurtà.
contacts.removeMessage: Din il-persuna ma tidhirx aktar fil-fluss ta' emerġenza tiegħek.
contacts.saveFailedMessage: Ma stajniex insalvaw dan il-kuntatt. Iċċekkja d-dettalji u erġa' ipprova.
contacts.removeFailedMessage: Ma stajniex neħħu dan il-kuntatt. Jekk jogħġbok ipprova mill-ġdid.

friends.title: Ħbieb
friends.subtitle: Gwardjani, talbiet, u grafu ta' emerġenza.
friends.emptyMessage: Ħbieb u gwardjani fidati jidhru hawn ladarba jiġu miżjuda.

emergency.title: Emerġenza SOS
emergency.subtitle: Eskala biss meta jkollok bżonn appoġġ immedjat.
emergency.body: Dan jinforma l-fluss tas-sigurtà tiegħek u jipprepara l-kuntatti ta' emerġenza.
emergency.quickShareMessage: Is-stub tal-qsim tal-post huwa lest. Ikkonnettja l-punt ta' tmiem tal-kondiviżjonijiet tal-backend biex tibgħat links ħajjin.

capybearTap.title: Capybear tap
capybearTap.subtitle: Agħti double tap fuq il-NorthStar biex tħalli orange tas-sigurtà.
capybearTap.body: Ir-rotta tal-ġesti hija lesta għall-wiring ta' avvenimenti BLE.

errors.voiceOffline: Tidher offline. Il-messaġġ tiegħek jintbagħat meta terġa' tikkonnettja.
errors.voiceQueued: Messaġġ salvat. Se jintbagħat meta l-kumpanija tal-vuċi terġa' tikkonnettja.
errors.voiceRetrying: Qed tipprova tibgħat il-messaġġ tiegħek mill-ġdid...
errors.microphone: Aċċess bil-mikrofonu huwa meħtieġ għall-isejħiet bil-vuċi. Tista' tippermettih fis-Settings, jew tikteb messaġġ minflok.
errors.billing: Il-kumpanija tal-vuċi online mhix disponibbli temporanjament. Tista' tkompli bil-companion offline.
errors.authentication: Il-kumpanija tal-vuċi ma setgħetx tikkonferma din is-sessjoni. Idħol mill-ġdid jew uża l-companion offline għalissa.
errors.timeout: Il-kumpanija tal-vuċi ħadet wisq żmien biex tirrispondi. Iċċekkja l-konnessjoni tiegħek u erġa' ipprova.
errors.network: Ma stajniex nilħqu lill-vuċi. Iċċekkja l-konnessjoni tiegħek, imbagħad ipprova mill-ġdid jew kompli offline.
errors.genericVoice: Xi ħaġa waqqfet is-sejħa bil-vuċi. Ipprova mill-ġdid, jew kompli bil-companion offline.

ios.NSMicrophoneUsageDescription: VeryLoving jeħtieġ aċċess mikrofoniku għas-sigurtà u AI sejħiet ta' sħubija.
ios.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: VeryLoving juża l-post tiegħek għall-mappa tas-sigurtà u l-karatteristiċi tas-sigurtà fil-viċin.
ios.NSBluetoothAlwaysUsageDescription: VeryLoving juża Bluetooth biex jikkonnettja mal-ġojjellerija tas-sigurtà NorthStar.

releaseCritical.authUnavailable: Din l-għażla tad-dħul mhix disponibbli f’din il-verżjoni.
releaseCritical.demoModeNotice: Il-modalità demo tuża biss data fittizja lokali. Is-servizzi konnessi mhumiex awtentikati, u din is-sessjoni terġa’ tiġi ssettjata meta l-app terġa’ titgħabba.
releaseCritical.authCodeInvalid: Il-kodiċi ta’ verifika mhuwiex validu jew skada. Itlob kodiċi ġdid u erġa’ pprova.
releaseCritical.authRateLimited: Saru wisq tentattivi ta’ dħul. Stenna ftit, imbagħad erġa’ pprova.
releaseCritical.authTimeout: Il-verifika tad-dħul damet wisq. Iċċekkja l-konnessjoni tiegħek u erġa’ pprova.
releaseCritical.authNetwork: Ma stajniex nilħqu s-servizz tad-dħul. Iċċekkja l-konnessjoni tiegħek u erġa’ pprova.
releaseCritical.mapUnavailable: Il-mappa tas-sigurtà ma setgħetx titgħabba. Iċċekkja l-konnessjoni tiegħek u erġa’ pprova.
releaseCritical.mapCachedLocation: Il-post dirett mhuwiex disponibbli. Qed jintwera l-aħħar post issejvjat tiegħek minn %{capturedAt}.
releaseCritical.locationShareFailed: Ma stajniex naqsmu l-post tiegħek. Iċċekkja l-aċċess għall-post u erġa’ pprova.
releaseCritical.locationShareCached: Hawn l-aħħar post issejvjat tiegħi, irreġistrat fi %{capturedAt}:
releaseCritical.blePermission: L-aċċess għal Bluetooth huwa mitfi. Attivah fis-Settings, imbagħad erġa’ pprova.
releaseCritical.blePoweredOff: Bluetooth huwa mitfi. Ixgħelu, imbagħad erġa’ pprova.
releaseCritical.bleUnavailable: It-tqabbil permezz ta’ Bluetooth mhuwiex disponibbli fuq dan l-apparat jew f’din il-verżjoni.
releaseCritical.bleScanFailed: Ma stajniex insibu NorthStar. Żommu viċin, iċċekkja Bluetooth, u erġa’ pprova.
releaseCritical.bleNoDevices: Ma nstab l-ebda apparat NorthStar fil-qrib. Żommu viċin u erġa’ fittex.
releaseCritical.bleConnectFailed: Ma stajniex nikkonnettjaw ma’ NorthStar. Żommu ċċarġjat u fil-qrib, imbagħad erġa’ pprova.
releaseCritical.savePlaceFailed: Ma stajniex insalvaw dan il-post. Erġa’ pprova.
releaseCritical.sosDialerOpened: Infetaħ id-dialer tat-telefon; it-telefonata mhix ikkonfermata.
releaseCritical.sosContactRequired: Ma kien disponibbli l-ebda kuntatt ta’ emerġenza; ma saret l-ebda telefonata.
releaseCritical.sosDialerFailed: Id-dialer tat-telefon ma setax jinfetaħ; ma saret l-ebda telefonata.
releaseCritical.sosUnknown: L-aħħar tentattiv SOS ma setax jiġi kkonfermat.
releaseCritical.voiceConfiguration: Il-kumpann bil-vuċi mhuwiex disponibbli bħalissa. Erġa’ pprova aktar tard jew kompli bil-kumpann offline.

medicalProfile.title: Emergency medical profile
medicalProfile.subtitle: Information you choose to share during an SOS
medicalProfile.description: Keep this information current. VeryLoving attaches it only to a connected SOS after you enable sharing; it is not sent through the phone call itself.
medicalProfile.conditionsHint: Enter one per line or separate items with commas.
medicalProfile.allergiesHint: Enter one per line or separate items with commas.
medicalProfile.medicationsHint: Enter one per line: name | dose | instructions.
medicalProfile.emergencyNotesHint: Add details that may help your emergency contacts.
medicalProfile.shareLabel: Include this profile with connected SOS alerts
medicalProfile.shareHint: When enabled, reviewed details may be sent to your synchronized emergency flow.
medicalProfile.consentBody: Saving with sharing enabled records your consent and review time. You can turn sharing off or clear this profile at any time.
medicalProfile.saved: Medical profile saved and review time recorded.
medicalProfile.loadFailed: We could not load your medical profile. Try again.
medicalProfile.saveFailed: We could not save your medical profile. Check the entries and try again.
medicalProfile.clearFailed: We could not clear your medical profile. Try again.
medicalProfile.clearMessage: This removes the emergency medical information stored securely on this device.

medication.title: Medication reminders
medication.subtitle: Schedule home robot reminders and caregiver escalation.
medication.referenceHint: Use a short private schedule reference with letters, numbers, hyphens, or underscores.
medication.noRobot: Pair a home robot before adding medication reminders.
medication.escalationHint: Caregivers are alerted only if the reminder remains unacknowledged.
medication.saveFailed: We could not save this medication reminder. Check the entries and try again.
medication.loadFailed: We could not load medication reminders. Try again.
medication.acknowledgeFailed: We could not acknowledge this medication reminder. Try again.

wellness.title: Wellbeing & connected care
wellness.subtitle: Gentle activities, emotional check-ins, and coordinated device support.
wellness.connectedCareUnavailable: Connected care needs a signed-in account and the VeryLoving service. Local activities and mood history still work on this device.
wellness.scenarioFailed: Connected care could not start or update. Check your connection and try again.

cognitive.title: Cognitive engagement
cognitive.subtitle: Choose a light memory game, a trivia question, or a conversation prompt.
cognitive.connectedBody: Ask your home companion to start a gentle activity and follow its progress here.
cognitive.connectedHint: Starts the cognitive engagement scenario on your account-bound devices.
cognitive.activitySubtitle: There is no score to chase. Pick what feels comfortable today.
cognitive.emptyMessage: Memory, trivia, and conversation are ready whenever you are.

memory.title: Memory cards
memory.description: Notice three symbols, then recall the middle one.

trivia.title: Friendly trivia
trivia.description: Answer a familiar question at your own pace.

conversation.title: Conversation prompt
conversation.description: Use a warm prompt to recall and share a story.

memory.title: Remember the middle symbol
memory.instruction: Take a moment to look at this sequence.
memory.question: Which symbol was in the middle?
memory.incorrect: Good try. Take another look and go at your own pace.

trivia.title: Friendly trivia
trivia.incorrect: Not this time—and that is completely okay.

one.prompt: What color is a clear daytime sky?

two.prompt: What is the largest organ of the human body?

three.prompt: How many days are in a week?

prompts.one: What is a meal that brings back a happy memory?
prompts.two: Who taught you something you still use today?
prompts.three: What song always lifts your mood?
prompts.four: What is a place you would enjoy visiting again?

emotional.title: Emotional check-in
emotional.subtitle: Notice how you feel, save a short reflection, or invite your companion to talk.
emotional.moodQuestion: How are you feeling right now?
emotional.moodHint: Choose the closest answer. There is no wrong choice.
emotional.reflectionHint: Keep it brief. Raw voice audio and transcripts are not saved here.
emotional.reflectionPlaceholder: A few words about this moment...
emotional.privacyNote: Your mood history is account-bound, included in privacy export, and removed with account data deletion.
emotional.saveFailed: We could not save this check-in. Please try again.
emotional.connectedBody: Start a consent-aware Hume conversation through your home companion. A user-started check-in never invents a stress reading.
emotional.connectedHint: Starts an emotional check-in on your account-bound home companion.
emotional.historySubtitle: Only your last 90 private check-ins are retained on this device.
emotional.historyLoadFailed: We could not load your check-in history.
emotional.historyEmptyMessage: Choose a mood above when you are ready.
emotional.deleteMessage: This removes the mood and short reflection from this device.
emotional.deleteFailed: We could not delete this check-in. Please try again.
emotional.humeContextNotice: When you start reflection, your selected mood and optional summary are shared as temporary Hume context. They are not treated as a stress reading.

scenarios.title: Connected care scenarios
scenarios.subtitle: Coordinate your wearable and home companion with clear safety boundaries.
scenarios.connectedCareBody: VeryLoving resolves your paired devices on the server, prevents duplicate actions, and tracks every execution.
scenarios.demoOffline: Demo mode never creates a bearer token, so connected scenarios stay offline. Sign in with a real development account to test the server flow.
scenarios.signInRequired: Sign in again to use connected care scenarios.
scenarios.notConfigured: Connected care is not configured in this build.
scenarios.networkError: The connected care service could not be reached. Your wearable can still work over Bluetooth.
scenarios.stillRunning: This scenario is still running. Refresh its status shortly.
scenarios.genericError: The connected care action could not be completed. Please retry.
scenarios.chooseActionBody: Actions with safety consequences always explain what will happen before they start.

descriptions.fall_detection: Run an analytics-only practice. It never moves a robot or alerts a contact.
descriptions.medication_adherence: Ask the robot to remind you now; unconfirmed reminders can escalate to a caregiver.
descriptions.emotional_check_in: Invite a calming, consent-aware Hume conversation.
descriptions.cognitive_engagement: Invite a gentle robot activity and voice game.
descriptions.ai_angel_auto_dial: Start the confirmed cross-device emergency flow.

confirmations.practiceBody: This records a practice event only. It will not move the robot, call anyone, or send an emergency alert.
confirmations.medicationBody: The robot will remind you now. If you do not confirm within the adherence window, the configured caregiver escalation can run.
confirmations.emergencyBody: This starts the real emergency workflow across your paired devices and may contact your configured emergency contact.
confirmations.cancelCriticalBody: Stopping a critical scenario can end active emergency steps. Continue only if you are sure help is no longer needed.

scenarios.wellnessToolsBody: Check in privately or choose an activity before involving connected devices.
scenarios.recentActivityBody: Status is encrypted, account-bound, and refreshed while work is active.
scenarios.emptyMessage: Start a wellbeing check-in or another quick action when you are ready.
scenarios.started: Scenario accepted. Live status is updating.
scenarios.fallbackNote: A planned fallback completed because a preferred step was unavailable.
scenarios.failedNote: The scenario could not finish. Check device connectivity and try again if it is safe.

feedback.title: Was this helpful?
feedback.message: Tell us whether %{interaction} supported you. We save only the rating, not a free-text response.
feedback.helpfulHint: Records a thumbs-up rating for this completed interaction.
feedback.notHelpfulHint: Records a thumbs-down rating for this completed interaction.
feedback.error: We could not save your rating. Please try again.
